subtasks.description: Query SAM system (via SQL/database) to retrieve contract renewal dates, current status, and contract metadata for all active licenses
Query consumption/usage database to calculate trend metrics (30/60/90-day usage trends, growth rate, peak usage) for licenses identified in renewal check

Reconcile renewal dates with consumption trends to assess renewal risk (urgency tier, budget impact, compliance risk), generate alert payloads, and create notification action plan for procurement team

plan.cost_rationale: 3 subtasks required: (1) SAM renewal date extraction is a straightforward single-source query (sql_gen, small tier). (2) Consumption trends require multi-table aggregation and time-windowing logic (sql_gen, mid tier) with dependency on renewal data. (3) Risk assessment and notification orchestration involves cross-signal reconciliation (renewal urgency + usage patterns + compliance context) and notification payload generation—this is cross_recon work (mid tier). We do NOT add a separate multitool_plan or policy_action: the notification routing is part of cross_recon output, and no explicit governance policy evaluation is requested—only risk-driven alerting.

output.sql: SELECT contract_id, vendor_name, MIN(invoice_date) AS contract_start, MAX(due_date) AS renewal_date, MAX(status) AS current_status, COUNT(invoice_id) AS invoice_count, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_contract_value FROM invoice_facts WHERE status IN ('active', 'pending', 'paid') GROUP BY contract_id, vendor_name ORDER BY renewal_date ASC

output.raw_output: {"sql": "SELECT cf.license_id, cf.vendor_name, cf.publisher, cf.product, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS usage_30d, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 days' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS usage_60d, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS usage_90d, MAX(cf.daily_active_seats) AS peak_seats, AVG(cf.daily_active_seats) AS avg_seats, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 days' AND cf.event_date < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN (SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 days' AND cf.event_date < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 days' AND cf.event_date < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) * 100 ELSE 0 END AS growth_rate_pct FROM consumption_facts cf JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT vendor_name FROM invoice_facts WHERE status IN ('active','pending','paid')) v ON cf.publisher = v.vendor_name WHERE cf.event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY cf.license_id, cf.vendor_name, cf.publisher, cf.product
